creator: meritus@innervision.pl
text:
makc@FreeBSD.org pisze:
> Synopsis: New port: polish/qfaktury
>
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: makc
> State-Changed-When: Sun May 3 12:34:37 UTC 2009
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Could you please translate description to english and exclude non-ASCII
> characters.  Thanks.
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=133878
>   
pkg-descr:

QFaktury is a polish free invoincing system running on Windows,
Linux, BSD and Mac OS X. Supports invoice, pro forma invoice
and invoice correction printing. Stores database of invoices, goods
and contractors.

Hope that's OK.

Best regards
Piotr Rybicki
